title: Edible Eggs
description: Adds a cooked variant to every egg obtainable in survival.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/YzZKnLM-3to" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# **EGGS**

## Cooked Egg
  ![A fried egg with browned edges and a bright yellow yolk](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e1a76df21349ba3e6cf062425cb094b9d9c42b10.png)

Obtained when putting a **chicken egg** in a furnace, smoker, or campfire.

_Nutrition : 2_

_Saturation : 2_
  
## Cooked Turtle Egg
  ![A fried egg with browned edges and a bright green yolk](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f0cb029a324ccfea985832401bebebf092cb441a.png)

Obtained when putting a **turtle egg** in a furnace, smoker, or campfire.

_Nutrition : 3_

_Saturation : 3_
  
## Cooked Sniffer Egg
  ![A fried egg with browned edges and a bright red yolk](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5fda20081bd0c0cc5608d8c5857cb9f0c3b47c78.png)

Obtained when putting a **sniffer egg** in a furnace, smoker, or campfire.

_Nutrition : 10_

_Saturation : 5_

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

## Void Egg
  ![A black fried egg with dark purple protrusions and a purple yolk](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ef07c3a88266c85b7d37967948d9639b45052b1.png)

Obtained when putting a **dragon egg** in a furnace, smoker, or campfire.
Once eaten, you'll always return to the end platform if you're ever to fall into the end void.

Remember, there's **only one** dragon egg. Whoever eats it will be the **only one** that gets these benefits.

_Nutrition : 20_

_Saturation : 20_

</details>

All the eggs take **1 second to consume** as apposed to the 1.61 seconds other foods take. Dried kelp being the only exception, taking 0.865 seconds. It's pretty gross to eat these eggs, but it's worth it.
